name: Travel Daydream Tier List
tagline: Where your passport would go if money and PTO were imaginary.

items.text: Tokyo at night — neon alleys, vending machines, and a ramen shop with six seats
Lisbon — azulejo tiles, tram hills, and pasteis that ruin all others
Patagonia — wind that rewrites your hair and peaks that humiliate your photos
Marrakech souks — spice air, bargaining, and mint tea on a rooftop
Iceland — a waterfall you can walk behind and black sand that sticks to everything
New Orleans — jazz on a porch, beignets, and humidity as a personality
Banff — a lake so blue it looks filtered in real life
The Amalfi Coast — a cliffside lemon spritz and a bus ride that tests faith
Kyoto in autumn — a temple garden and silence that feels expensive
An East African safari at dawn — coffee in a tin cup and dust in your teeth
Bali rice terraces — green steps, scooter traffic, and a massage you didn't schedule
Prague in fog — cobblestones, castle silhouettes, and trdelník guilt
Santorini sunset — crowded, cliché, and somehow still worth it
Cusco — altitude headache, alpaca selfies, and history under your boots
Hanoi street food crawl — plastic stools, motorbikes, and broth that fixes you
A Norwegian fjord — ferry ride, wool sweater, and quiet that scares you a little
